description_long: This is a modern, spacious bungalow set within a walled lot featuring a large backyard with a tennis court, landscaped gardens, and multiple outdoor seating areas. The main building is two stories high, with a flat roof adorned with geometric patterns and several skylights. The front facade showcases large, floor-to-ceiling windows and a prominent entryway, while the rear opens to a patio and pool area. The property includes a driveway with parked vehicles and is surrounded by lush greenery, palm trees, and decorative shrubs. Outdoor amenities such as lounge chairs, a barbecue area, and a tennis court are visible, enhancing the recreational appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of concrete, glass, and metal materials.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard tennis court, set within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway with cars, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, pool area, and tennis court, with the flat roof and skylights visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, pool, outdoor seating, and tennis court, with the back facade's windows and doors.
description_view_3: Side/front view featuring the driveway, parked cars, and a clear view of the tennis court and garden layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
